name: Cleartext Storage in a File or on Disk
description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext in a file or on disk. Attackers with access to the file system or physical/administrative access to the raw disk can read the sensitive data directly.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (file write, disk persistence) receiving sensitive data from TRANSFORM or INGRESS nodes without a TRANSFORM mediator (encryption, hashing) that protects the data before it reaches persistent storage.
